subject: Clarify tool scope: software company + any client, not inter-company focus
body:
- Change default from related parties to independent parties
- Remove consolidation options from entity config UI (out of scope)
- Rename "Developer Entity" to "Your Company", "Buyer Entity" to "Client"
- Update "Combined" perspective to "Net Effect" with simplified view
- Remove consolidation elimination section from results display
- Update terminology throughout: "Inter-Company Tool" → "Transaction Structuring Tool"
- Update documentation (claude.md) to reflect correct scope

The tool is for a software company to compare transaction models with ANY client
(related or not) to maximize value for both parties on projects/products.
Consolidated accounting is explicitly NOT in scope.
title: Clarify tool scope: software company + any client, not inter-company focus
